meta.title: Valued Living Questionnaire (VLQ)
meta.subtitle: Assess importance and consistency in key life domains.
meta.description: Rate each domain for importance and how consistently you lived it recently. Results highlight strengths and value-action gaps.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment supports self-reflection and does not provide a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

items.vlq_family_importance: How important is family in your life?
items.vlq_family_consistency: How consistently did you live according to your values in family recently?

items.vlq_intimateRelationships_consistency: How consistently did you live according to your values in intimate relationships recently?
